FinancialMetric.name: Cash and Cash Equivalents, at Carrying Value
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of currency on hand as well as demand deposits with banks or financial institutions. Includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits. Also includes short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Excludes cash and cash equivalents within disposal group and discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Assets
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of assets classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Assets
FinancialMetric.description: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are recognized. Assets are probable future economic benefits obtained or controlled by an entity as a result of past transactions or events.

FinancialMetric.name: Liabilities
FinancialMetric.description: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all liabilities that are recognized. Liabilities are probable future sacrifices of economic benefits arising from present obligations of an entity to transfer assets or provide services to other entities in the future.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Value, Issued
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable common stock (or common stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable common shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

FinancialMetric.name: Additional Paid in Capital
FinancialMetric.description: Excess of issue price over par or stated value of the entity's capital stock and amounts received from other transactions involving the entity's stock or stockholders. Includes adjustments to additional paid in capital. Some examples of such adjustments include recording the issuance of debt with a beneficial conversion feature and certain tax consequences of equity instruments awarded to employees. Use this element for the aggregate amount of additional paid-in capital associated with common and preferred stock. For additional paid-in capital associated with only common stock, use the element additional paid in capital, common stock. For additional paid-in capital associated with only preferred stock, use the element additional paid in capital, preferred stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Retained Earnings (Accumulated Deficit)
FinancialMetric.description: The cumulative amount of the reporting entity's undistributed earnings or deficit.

FinancialMetric.name: Stockholders' Equity Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Total of all stockholders' equity (deficit) items, net of receivables from officers, directors, owners, and affiliates of the entity which are attributable to the parent. The amount of the economic entity's stockholders' equity attributable to the parent excludes the amount of stockholders' equity which is allocable to that ownership interest in subsidiary equity which is not attributable to the parent (noncontrolling interest, minority interest). This excludes temporary equity and is sometimes called permanent equity.

FinancialMetric.name: Liabilities and Equity
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of liabilities and equity items, including the portion of equity attributable to noncontrolling interests, if any.

FinancialMetric.name: Entity Common Stock, Shares Outstanding
FinancialMetric.description: Indicate number of shares or other units outstanding of each of registrant's classes of capital or common stock or other ownership interests, if and as stated on cover of related periodic report. Where multiple classes or units exist define each class/interest by adding class of stock items such as Common Class A [Member], Common Class B [Member] or Partnership Interest [Member] onto the Instrument [Domain] of the Entity Listings, Instrument.

FinancialMetric.name: Entity Public Float
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate market value of the voting and non-voting common equity held by non-affiliates computed by reference to the price at which the common equity was last sold, or the average bid and asked price of such common equity, as of the last business day of the registrant's most recently completed second fiscal quarter.

FinancialMetric.name: Accounts Payable, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of liabilities incurred (and for which invoices have typically been received) and payable to vendors for goods and services received that are used in an entity's business. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Accounts Receivable, after Allowance for Credit Loss, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Accumulated Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization, Property, Plant, and Equipment
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of accumulated depreciation, depletion and amortization for physical assets used in the normal conduct of business to produce goods and services.

FinancialMetric.name: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Accumulated change in equity from transactions and other events and circumstances from non-owner sources, net of tax effect, at period end. Excludes Net Income (Loss), and accumulated changes in equity from transactions resulting from investments by owners and distributions to owners. Includes foreign currency translation items, certain pension adjustments, unrealized gains and losses on certain investments in debt and equity securities, other than temporary impairment (OTTI) losses related to factors other than credit losses on available-for-sale and held-to-maturity debt securities that an entity does not intend to sell and it is not more likely than not that the entity will be required to sell before recovery of the amortized cost basis, as well as changes in the fair value of derivatives related to the effective portion of a designated cash flow hedge.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expense for award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes amount capitalized.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expense for award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes amount capitalized.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expense for award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes amount capitalized.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expense for award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes amount capitalized.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Intangible Assets
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense charged against earnings to allocate the cost of intangible assets (nonphysical assets not used in production) in a systematic and rational manner to the periods expected to benefit from such assets. As a noncash expense, this element is added back to net income when calculating cash provided by or used in operations using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Intangible Assets
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense charged against earnings to allocate the cost of intangible assets (nonphysical assets not used in production) in a systematic and rational manner to the periods expected to benefit from such assets. As a noncash expense, this element is added back to net income when calculating cash provided by or used in operations using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Intangible Assets
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense charged against earnings to allocate the cost of intangible assets (nonphysical assets not used in production) in a systematic and rational manner to the periods expected to benefit from such assets. As a noncash expense, this element is added back to net income when calculating cash provided by or used in operations using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Intangible Assets
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense charged against earnings to allocate the cost of intangible assets (nonphysical assets not used in production) in a systematic and rational manner to the periods expected to benefit from such assets. As a noncash expense, this element is added back to net income when calculating cash provided by or used in operations using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Antidilutive Securities Excluded from Computation of Earnings Per Share, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Securities (including those issuable pursuant to contingent stock agreements) that could potentially dilute basic earnings per share (EPS) or earnings per unit (EPU) in the future that were not included in the computation of diluted EPS or EPU because to do so would increase EPS or EPU amounts or decrease loss per share or unit amounts for the period presented.

FinancialMetric.name: Antidilutive Securities Excluded from Computation of Earnings Per Share, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Securities (including those issuable pursuant to contingent stock agreements) that could potentially dilute basic earnings per share (EPS) or earnings per unit (EPU) in the future that were not included in the computation of diluted EPS or EPU because to do so would increase EPS or EPU amounts or decrease loss per share or unit amounts for the period presented.

FinancialMetric.name: Antidilutive Securities Excluded from Computation of Earnings Per Share, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Securities (including those issuable pursuant to contingent stock agreements) that could potentially dilute basic earnings per share (EPS) or earnings per unit (EPU) in the future that were not included in the computation of diluted EPS or EPU because to do so would increase EPS or EPU amounts or decrease loss per share or unit amounts for the period presented.

FinancialMetric.name: Antidilutive Securities Excluded from Computation of Earnings Per Share, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Securities (including those issuable pursuant to contingent stock agreements) that could potentially dilute basic earnings per share (EPS) or earnings per unit (EPU) in the future that were not included in the computation of diluted EPS or EPU because to do so would increase EPS or EPU amounts or decrease loss per share or unit amounts for the period presented.

FinancialMetric.name: Assets, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are expected to be realized in cash, sold, or consumed within one year (or the normal operating cycle, if longer). Assets are probable future economic benefits obtained or controlled by an entity as a result of past transactions or events.

FinancialMetric.name: Buildings and Improvements, Gross
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before accumulated depreciation of building structures held for productive use including addition, improvement, or renovation to the structure, including, but not limited to, interior masonry, interior flooring, electrical, and plumbing.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash and Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents. Cash and cash equivalents are the amount of currency on hand as well as demand deposits with banks or financial institutions. Includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits. Also includes short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Includes effect from exchange rate changes.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash and Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents. Cash and cash equivalents are the amount of currency on hand as well as demand deposits with banks or financial institutions. Includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits. Also includes short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Includes effect from exchange rate changes.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash and Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents. Cash and cash equivalents are the amount of currency on hand as well as demand deposits with banks or financial institutions. Includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits. Also includes short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Includes effect from exchange rate changes.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash and Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents. Cash and cash equivalents are the amount of currency on hand as well as demand deposits with banks or financial institutions. Includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits. Also includes short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Includes effect from exchange rate changes.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash and Restricted Cash Equivalents
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash and cash equivalents, and cash and cash equivalents restricted to withdrawal or usage. Excludes amount for disposal group and discontinued operations. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash and Restricted Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease), Including Exchange Rate Effect
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash, cash equivalents, and cash and cash equivalents restricted to withdrawal or usage; including effect from exchange rate change. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash and Restricted Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease), Including Exchange Rate Effect
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash, cash equivalents, and cash and cash equivalents restricted to withdrawal or usage; including effect from exchange rate change. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash and Restricted Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease), Including Exchange Rate Effect
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash, cash equivalents, and cash and cash equivalents restricted to withdrawal or usage; including effect from exchange rate change. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash and Restricted Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease), Including Exchange Rate Effect
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash, cash equivalents, and cash and cash equivalents restricted to withdrawal or usage; including effect from exchange rate change. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

FinancialMetric.name: Commercial Paper
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of short-term borrowings using unsecured obligations issued by banks, corporations and other borrowers to investors. The maturities of these money market securities generally do not exceed 270 days.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Declared
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends declared during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Declared
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends declared during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Declared
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends declared during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Shares Authorized
FinancialMetric.description: The maximum number of common shares permitted to be issued by an entity's charter and bylaws.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Shares, Outstanding
FinancialMetric.description: Number of shares of common stock outstanding. Common stock represent the ownership interest in a corporation.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stocks, Including Additional Paid in Capital
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of par value plus amounts in excess of par value or issuance value for common stock issued.

FinancialMetric.name: Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events and circumstances from net income and other comprehensive income, attributable to parent entity. Excludes changes in equity resulting from investments by owners and distributions to owners.

FinancialMetric.name: Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events and circumstances from net income and other comprehensive income, attributable to parent entity. Excludes changes in equity resulting from investments by owners and distributions to owners.

FinancialMetric.name: Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events and circumstances from net income and other comprehensive income, attributable to parent entity. Excludes changes in equity resulting from investments by owners and distributions to owners.

FinancialMetric.name: Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events and circumstances from net income and other comprehensive income, attributable to parent entity. Excludes changes in equity resulting from investments by owners and distributions to owners.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as noncurrent.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Revenue Recognized
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue recognized that was previously included in balance of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Revenue Recognized
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue recognized that was previously included in balance of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Revenue Recognized
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue recognized that was previously included in balance of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Liability, Revenue Recognized
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue recognized that was previously included in balance of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate costs related to goods produced and sold and services rendered by an entity during the reporting period. This excludes costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered and other revenue generating activities.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate costs related to goods produced and sold and services rendered by an entity during the reporting period. This excludes costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered and other revenue generating activities.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate costs related to goods produced and sold and services rendered by an entity during the reporting period. This excludes costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered and other revenue generating activities.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Total costs related to goods produced and sold during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Total costs related to goods produced and sold during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate cost of goods produced and sold and services rendered during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate cost of goods produced and sold and services rendered during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate cost of goods produced and sold and services rendered during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate cost of goods produced and sold and services rendered during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Current Federal Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of current federal tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Current Foreign Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of current foreign income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Current Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to taxable income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Current State and Local Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of current state and local tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Long-term Debt, Gross
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before unamortized (discount) premium and debt issuance costs, of long-term debt. Includes, but is not limited to, notes payable, bonds payable, commercial loans, mortgage loans, convertible debt, subordinated debt and other types of debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Unamortized Discount (Premium) and Debt Issuance Costs, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Debt Instrument, Unamortized Discount (Premium) and Debt Issuance Costs, Net

FinancialMetric.name: Debt, Long-term and Short-term, Combined Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Represents the aggregate of total long-term debt, including current maturities and short-term debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Federal Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred federal income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Foreign Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred foreign income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Gross
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Income Tax Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences with jurisdictional netting.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Revenue, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred income and obligation to transfer product and service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred State and Local Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred state and local tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Deferred Income
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from deferred income.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Gross
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Net of Valuation Allowance
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Net of Valuation Allowance, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards classified as noncurrent.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Other
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowance, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences, classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Compensation and Benefits, Share-based Compensation Cost
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from share-based compensation.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Other
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowance, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from provisions, reserves, allowances, and accruals, classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Valuation Allowance
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax assets for which it is more likely than not that a tax benefit will not be realized.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences without jurisdictional netting.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Net, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences, with jurisdictional netting and classified as noncurrent.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Other
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Undistributed Foreign Earnings
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from undistributed earnings of subsidiary and other recognized entity not within country of domicile. Includes, but is not limited to, other basis differences.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liability Not Recognized, Amount of Unrecognized Deferred Tax Liability, Undistributed Earnings of Foreign Subsidiaries
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax liability not recognized because of the exceptions to comprehensive recognition of deferred taxes related to undistributed earnings of foreign subsidiaries.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the cost of tangible assets over the assets' useful lives. Includes production and non-production related depreciation.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the cost of tangible assets over the assets' useful lives. Includes production and non-production related depreciation.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the cost of tangible assets over the assets' useful lives. Includes production and non-production related depreciation.

FinancialMetric.name: Dividends, Common Stock, Cash
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of paid and unpaid common stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash.

FinancialMetric.name: Dividends, Common Stock, Cash
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of paid and unpaid common stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash.

FinancialMetric.name: Dividends, Common Stock, Cash
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of paid and unpaid common stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Earnings Per Share, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, at Federal Statutory Income Tax Rate, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Net earnings after all expenses and taxes

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Foreign Income Tax Rate Differential, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations applicable to statutory income tax expense (benefit) outside of the country of domicile.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, State and Local Income Taxes, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations applicable to state and local income tax expense (benefit), net of federal tax expense (benefit).

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Research, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to research tax credit.

FinancialMetric.name: Employee-related Liabilities, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Total of the carrying values as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred through that date and payable for obligations related to services received from employees, such as accrued salaries and bonuses, payroll taxes and fringe benefits. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense, Tax Benefit
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax benefit for recognition of expense of award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Excess Tax Benefit from Share-based Compensation, Financing Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash inflow from realized tax benefit related to deductible compensation cost reported on the entity's tax return for equity instruments in excess of the compensation cost for those instruments recognized for financial reporting purposes.

FinancialMetric.name: Excess Tax Benefit from Share-based Compensation, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for realized tax benefit related to deductible compensation cost reported on the entity's tax return for equity instruments in excess of the compensation cost for those instruments recognized for financial reporting purposes.

FinancialMetric.name: Excess Tax Benefit from Share-based Compensation, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for realized tax benefit related to deductible compensation cost reported on the entity's tax return for equity instruments in excess of the compensation cost for those instruments recognized for financial reporting purposes.

FinancialMetric.name: Excess Tax Benefit from Share-based Compensation, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for realized tax benefit related to deductible compensation cost reported on the entity's tax return for equity instruments in excess of the compensation cost for those instruments recognized for financial reporting purposes.

FinancialMetric.name: Excess Tax Benefit from Share-based Compensation, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for realized tax benefit related to deductible compensation cost reported on the entity's tax return for equity instruments in excess of the compensation cost for those instruments recognized for financial reporting purposes.

FinancialMetric.name: Finance Lease, Liability
FinancialMetric.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease.

FinancialMetric.name: Finance Lease, Liability, Payment, Due

FinancialMetric.name: Research and Development Expense
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate costs incurred (1) in a planned search or critical investigation aimed at discovery of new knowledge with the hope that such knowledge will be useful in developing a new product or service, a new process or technique, or in bringing about a significant improvement to an existing product or process; or (2) to translate research findings or other knowledge into a plan or design for a new product or process or for a significant improvement to an existing product or process whether intended for sale or the entity's use, during the reporting period charged to research and development projects, including the costs of developing computer software up to the point in time of achieving technological feasibility, and costs allocated in accounting for a business combination to in-process projects deemed to have no alternative future use.

These shares represent capital invested by the firm's shareholders and owners, and may be all or only a portion of the number of shares authorized. Shares issued include shares outstanding and shares held in the treasury.

FinancialMetric.name: Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Employee Related Liabilities
FinancialMetric.description: The increase (decrease) during the reporting period in the aggregate amount of obligations related to services received from employees, such as accrued salaries and bonuses, payroll taxes and fringe benefits.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Employee Related Liabilities
FinancialMetric.description: The increase (decrease) during the reporting period in the aggregate amount of obligations related to services received from employees, such as accrued salaries and bonuses, payroll taxes and fringe benefits.

FinancialMetric.name: Stockholders' Equity Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Total of all stockholders' equity (deficit) items, net of receivables from officers, directors, owners, and affiliates of the entity which is directly or indirectly attributable to that ownership interest in subsidiary equity which is not attributable to the parent (that is, noncontrolling interest, previously referred to as minority interest).

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Dividends
FinancialMetric.description: Cash outflow in the form of capital distributions and dividends to common shareholders, preferred shareholders and noncontrolling interests.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Dividends
FinancialMetric.description: Cash outflow in the form of capital distributions and dividends to common shareholders, preferred shareholders and noncontrolling interests.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Dividends
FinancialMetric.description: Cash outflow in the form of capital distributions and dividends to common shareholders, preferred shareholders and noncontrolling interests.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Dividends
FinancialMetric.description: Cash outflow in the form of capital distributions and dividends to common shareholders, preferred shareholders and noncontrolling interests.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Issuance of Long-term Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from a debt initially having maturity due after one year or beyond the operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Issuance of Long-term Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from a debt initially having maturity due after one year or beyond the operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Issuance of Long-term Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from a debt initially having maturity due after one year or beyond the operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Issuance of Long-term Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from a debt initially having maturity due after one year or beyond the operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale, Maturity and Collection of Investments
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow associated with the sale, maturity and collection of all investments such as debt, security and so forth during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale, Maturity and Collection of Investments
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow associated with the sale, maturity and collection of all investments such as debt, security and so forth during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale, Maturity and Collection of Investments
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow associated with the sale, maturity and collection of all investments such as debt, security and so forth during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale, Maturity and Collection of Investments
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow associated with the sale, maturity and collection of all investments such as debt, security and so forth during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss), Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss), Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss), Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss), Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Stockholders' Equity, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of stockholders' equity (deficit), net of receivables from officers, directors, owners, and affiliates of the entity, attributable to both the parent and noncontrolling interests. Amount excludes temporary equity. Alternate caption for the concept is permanent equity.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Goodwill and Intangible Assets
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from intangible assets including goodwill.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Expense (Benefit), Share-based Payment Arrangement, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying domestic federal statutory income tax rate to pretax income (loss) from continuing operation, attributable to expense for award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes expense determined to be nondeductible upon grant or after for award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Intangible Assets, Gross (Excluding Goodwill)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before accumulated amortization of intangible assets, excluding goodwill.

FinancialMetric.name: Interest Paid, Excluding Capitalized Interest, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash paid for interest, excluding capitalized interest, classified as operating activity. Includes, but is not limited to, payment to settle zero-coupon bond for accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Issued During Period, Value, Acquisitions
FinancialMetric.description: Value of stock issued pursuant to acquisitions during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Shares Issued, Value, Share-based Payment Arrangement, after Forfeiture
FinancialMetric.description: Value, after forfeiture, of shares issued under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes employee stock ownership plan (ESOP).

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Accrued Liabilities, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred and payable, pertaining to costs that are statutory in nature, are incurred on contractual obligations, or accumulate over time and for which invoices have not yet been received or will not be rendered. Examples include taxes, interest, rent and utilities. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Amortization of Debt Issuance Costs and Discounts
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of amortization expense attributable to debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Combination, Acquisition Related Costs
FinancialMetric.description: This element represents acquisition-related costs incurred to effect a business combination which costs have been expensed during the period. Such costs include finder's fees; advisory, legal, accounting, valuation, and other professional or consulting fees; general administrative costs, including the costs of maintaining an internal acquisitions department; and may include costs of registering and issuing debt and equity securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold, Amortization (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the costs of intangible assets over the expected benefit period of such assets. This element applies only to intangible assets used in the production of goods.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost of Goods Sold, Amortization (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the costs of intangible assets over the expected benefit period of such assets. This element applies only to intangible assets used in the production of goods.

FinancialMetric.name: Cumulative Effect of New Accounting Principle in Period of Adoption (Deprecated 2020-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) to equity or (increase) decrease to net assets, resulting from the cumulative effect adjustment of a new accounting principle applied in the period of adoption.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of short-term debt and current maturity of long-term debt and capital lease obligations due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Income Tax Assets, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after allocation of valuation allowances and deferred tax liability, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible differences and carryforwards, with jurisdictional netting.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible assets, intangible assets, or depleting assets to periods that benefit from use of the assets.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Nonvested Award, Cost Not yet Recognized, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cost not yet recognized for nonvested award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Extinguishment of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: Difference between the fair value of payments made and the carrying amount of debt which is extinguished prior to maturity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations, Adjustment of Deferred Tax (Asset) Liability
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income tax expense (benefit) from continuing operations attributable to an adjustment of a deferred tax liability or asset for enacted changes in tax laws or rates or a change in the tax status of the entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Taxes Paid, Net
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of cash paid during the current period to foreign, federal, state, and local authorities as taxes on income, net of any cash received during the current period as refunds for the overpayment of taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Taxes Paid, Net
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of cash paid during the current period to foreign, federal, state, and local authorities as taxes on income, net of any cash received during the current period as refunds for the overpayment of taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Taxes Paid, Net
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of cash paid during the current period to foreign, federal, state, and local authorities as taxes on income, net of any cash received during the current period as refunds for the overpayment of taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Interest Paid, Excluding Capitalized Interest, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash paid for interest, excluding capitalized interest, classified as operating activity. Includes, but is not limited to, payment to settle zero-coupon bond for accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount.

FinancialMetric.name: Interest Paid, Excluding Capitalized Interest, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash paid for interest, excluding capitalized interest, classified as operating activity. Includes, but is not limited to, payment to settle zero-coupon bond for accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount.

FinancialMetric.name: Interest Paid, Excluding Capitalized Interest, Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash paid for interest, excluding capitalized interest, classified as operating activity. Includes, but is not limited to, payment to settle zero-coupon bond for accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount.

FinancialMetric.name: Interest Payable, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of [accrued] interest payable on all forms of debt, including trade payables, that has been incurred and is unpaid. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Litigation Settlement, Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of litigation expense, including but not limited to legal, forensic, accounting, and investigative fees.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Reportable Segments
FinancialMetric.description: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Lease, Liability, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments Due
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable letter-terms in excess of one year.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments Due, Next Twelve Months
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the next fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Five Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Four Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the fourth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Three Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the third fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due in Two Years
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due in the second fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Future Minimum Payments, Due Thereafter
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of required minimum rental payments for operating leases having an initial or remaining non-cancelable lease term in excess of one year due after the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Accrued Liabilities, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expenses incurred but not yet paid classified as other, due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment
FinancialMetric.description: Minimum amount of other commitment not otherwise specified in the taxonomy. Excludes commitments explicitly modeled in the taxonomy, including but not limited to, long-term and short-term purchase commitments, recorded and unrecorded purchase obligations, supply commitments, registration payment arrangements, leases, debt, product warranties, guarantees, environmental remediation obligations, and pensions.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and before reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Noncash Income (Expense)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income (expense) included in net income that results in no cash inflow (outflow), classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Noncash Income (Expense)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income (expense) included in net income that results in no cash inflow (outflow), classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Noncash Income (Expense)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income (expense) included in net income that results in no cash inflow (outflow), classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Noncash Income (Expense)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income (expense) included in net income that results in no cash inflow (outflow), classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow paid to third parties in connection with debt origination, which will be amortized over the remaining maturity period of the associated long-term debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow paid to third parties in connection with debt origination, which will be amortized over the remaining maturity period of the associated long-term debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Par or Stated Value Per Share
FinancialMetric.description: Face amount or stated value per share of preferred stock nonredeemable or redeemable solely at the option of the issuer.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Shares Authorized
FinancialMetric.description: The maximum number of nonredeemable preferred shares (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer) permitted to be issued by an entity's charter and bylaws.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Shares Issued
FinancialMetric.description: Total number of nonredeemable preferred shares (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer) issued to shareholders (includes related preferred shares that were issued, repurchased, and remain in the treasury). May be all or portion of the number of preferred shares authorized. Excludes preferred shares that are classified as debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Shares Outstanding
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate share number for all nonredeemable preferred stock (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer) held by stockholders. Does not include preferred shares that have been repurchased.

FinancialMetric.name: Prepaid Expense, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of asset related to consideration paid in advance for costs that provide economic benefits within a future period of one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow during the period from the repayment of aggregate short-term and long-term debt. Excludes payment of capital lease obligations.

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow during the period from the repayment of aggregate short-term and long-term debt. Excludes payment of capital lease obligations.

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow during the period from the repayment of aggregate short-term and long-term debt. Excludes payment of capital lease obligations.

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Long-term Capital Lease Obligations
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow for the obligation for a lease meeting the criteria for capitalization (with maturities exceeding one year or beyond the operating cycle of the entity, if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Long-term Capital Lease Obligations
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow for the obligation for a lease meeting the criteria for capitalization (with maturities exceeding one year or beyond the operating cycle of the entity, if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Long-term Capital Lease Obligations
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow for the obligation for a lease meeting the criteria for capitalization (with maturities exceeding one year or beyond the operating cycle of the entity, if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Selling, General and Administrative Expense
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate total costs related to selling a firm's product and services, as well as all other general and administrative expenses. Direct selling expenses (for example, credit, warranty, and advertising) are expenses that can be directly linked to the sale of specific products. Indirect selling expenses are expenses that cannot be directly linked to the sale of specific products, for example telephone expenses, Internet, and postal charges. General and administrative expenses include salaries of non-sales personnel, rent, utilities, communication, etc.

FinancialMetric.name: Selling, General and Administrative Expense
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate total costs related to selling a firm's product and services, as well as all other general and administrative expenses. Direct selling expenses (for example, credit, warranty, and advertising) are expenses that can be directly linked to the sale of specific products. Indirect selling expenses are expenses that cannot be directly linked to the sale of specific products, for example telephone expenses, Internet, and postal charges. General and administrative expenses include salaries of non-sales personnel, rent, utilities, communication, etc.

FinancialMetric.name: Selling, General and Administrative Expense
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate total costs related to selling a firm's product and services, as well as all other general and administrative expenses. Direct selling expenses (for example, credit, warranty, and advertising) are expenses that can be directly linked to the sale of specific products. Indirect selling expenses are expenses that cannot be directly linked to the sale of specific products, for example telephone expenses, Internet, and postal charges. General and administrative expenses include salaries of non-sales personnel, rent, utilities, communication, etc.

FinancialMetric.name: Selling, General and Administrative Expense
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate total costs related to selling a firm's product and services, as well as all other general and administrative expenses. Direct selling expenses (for example, credit, warranty, and advertising) are expenses that can be directly linked to the sale of specific products. Indirect selling expenses are expenses that cannot be directly linked to the sale of specific products, for example telephone expenses, Internet, and postal charges. General and administrative expenses include salaries of non-sales personnel, rent, utilities, communication, etc.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Number of Shares Available for Grant
FinancialMetric.description: The difference between the maximum number of shares (or other type of equity) authorized for issuance under the plan (including the effects of amendments and adjustments), and the sum of: 1) the number of shares (or other type of equity) already issued upon exercise of options or other equity-based awards under the plan; and 2) shares (or other type of equity) reserved for issuance on granting of outstanding awards, net of cancellations and forfeitures, if applicable.

FinancialMetric.name: Stockholders' Equity Note, Stock Split, Conversion Ratio
FinancialMetric.description: Ratio applied to the conversion of stock split, for example but not limited to, one share converted to two or two shares converted to one.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Repurchased and Retired During Period, Shares
FinancialMetric.description: Number of shares that have been repurchased and retired during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Repurchased and Retired During Period, Shares
FinancialMetric.description: Number of shares that have been repurchased and retired during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Repurchased and Retired During Period, Shares
FinancialMetric.description: Number of shares that have been repurchased and retired during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Repurchased and Retired During Period, Shares
FinancialMetric.description: Number of shares that have been repurchased and retired during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Repurchased and Retired During Period, Value
FinancialMetric.description: Equity impact of the value of stock that has been repurchased and retired during the period. The excess of the purchase price over par value can be charged against retained earnings (once the excess is fully allocated to additional paid in capital).

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Repurchased and Retired During Period, Value
FinancialMetric.description: Equity impact of the value of stock that has been repurchased and retired during the period. The excess of the purchase price over par value can be charged against retained earnings (once the excess is fully allocated to additional paid in capital).

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Repurchased and Retired During Period, Value
FinancialMetric.description: Equity impact of the value of stock that has been repurchased and retired during the period. The excess of the purchase price over par value can be charged against retained earnings (once the excess is fully allocated to additional paid in capital).

FinancialMetric.name: Taxes Payable, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred and payable for statutory income, sales, use, payroll, excise, real, property and other taxes. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Treasury Stock Acquired, Average Cost Per Share
FinancialMetric.description: Total cost of shares repurchased divided by the total number of shares repurchased.

FinancialMetric.name: Weighted Average Number Diluted Shares Outstanding Adjustment
FinancialMetric.description: The sum of dilutive potential common shares or units used in the calculation of the diluted per-share or per-unit computation.

FinancialMetric.name: Weighted Average Number Diluted Shares Outstanding Adjustment
FinancialMetric.description: The sum of dilutive potential common shares or units used in the calculation of the diluted per-share or per-unit computation.

FinancialMetric.name: Capital Expenditures Incurred but Not yet Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Future cash outflow to pay for purchases of fixed assets that have occurred.

FinancialMetric.name: Capital Expenditures Incurred but Not yet Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Future cash outflow to pay for purchases of fixed assets that have occurred.

FinancialMetric.name: Capital Expenditures Incurred but Not yet Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Future cash outflow to pay for purchases of fixed assets that have occurred.

FinancialMetric.name: Capital Expenditures Incurred but Not yet Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Future cash outflow to pay for purchases of fixed assets that have occurred.

FinancialMetric.name: Tax Credit Carryforward, Valuation Allowance
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of valuation allowance pertaining to the deferred tax asset representing potential future taxable deductions from tax credit carryforwards for which it is more likely than not that a tax benefit will not be realized.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of the unrecorded obligation to transfer funds in the future for fixed or minimum amounts or quantities of goods or services at fixed or minimum prices (for example, as in take-or-pay contracts or throughput contracts).

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Issued During Period, Value, New Issues
FinancialMetric.description: Equity impact of the value of new stock issued during the period. Includes shares issued in an initial public offering or a secondary public offering.

FinancialMetric.name: Common Stock, Dividends, Per Share, Cash Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate dividends paid during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

FinancialMetric.name: Decrease in Unrecognized Tax Benefits is Reasonably Possible
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease reasonably possible in the next twelve months for the unrecognized tax benefit.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Goodwill and Intangible Assets
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from intangible assets including goodwill.

FinancialMetric.name: Derivative, Fair Value, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Fair value of the assets less the liabilities of a derivative or group of derivatives.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense, Tax Benefit
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax benefit for recognition of expense of award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense, Tax Benefit
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax benefit for recognition of expense of award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Expense, Tax Benefit
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax benefit for recognition of expense of award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Finance Lease, Liability, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Finance Lease, Liability, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as noncurrent.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Rent Expense, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Rental expense for the reporting period incurred under operating leases, including minimum and any contingent rent expense, net of related sublease income.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), before Reclassification and Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before tax and reclassification, of gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in unrecognized tax benefits attributable to uncertain tax positions taken in tax returns.
