FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation, to be Paid, Year Five
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of fixed and determinable portion of unrecorded unconditional purchase obligation to be paid in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation, to be Paid, Year One
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of fixed and determinable portion of unrecorded unconditional purchase obligation to be paid in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation, to be Paid, Year Four
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of fixed and determinable portion of unrecorded unconditional purchase obligation to be paid in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation, to be Paid, Year Two
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of fixed and determinable portion of unrecorded unconditional purchase obligation to be paid in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation, to be Paid, Year Three
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of fixed and determinable portion of unrecorded unconditional purchase obligation to be paid in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation, to be Paid, after Year Five
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of fixed and determinable portion of unrecorded unconditional purchase obligation to be paid after fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecorded Unconditional Purchase Obligation, to be Paid, Remainder of Fiscal Year
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of fixed and determinable portion of unrecorded unconditional purchase obligation to be paid in remainder of current fiscal year.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Compensation and Benefits, Employee Benefits
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowance, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from employee benefits, classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of reported income tax expense (benefit) in excess of (less than) expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying domestic federal statutory income tax rate to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations, attributable to Tax Cuts and Jobs Act.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the parent.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the parent.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the parent.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) from continuing operations per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) from continuing operations per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) from continuing operations per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) derived from continuing operations during the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) derived from continuing operations during the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) derived from continuing operations during the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Interest Income, Other
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of interest income earned from interest bearing assets classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Letters of Credit Outstanding, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: The total amount of the contingent obligation under letters of credit outstanding as of the reporting date.

FinancialMetric.name: Long-term Debt and Lease Obligation
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of long-term debt and lease obligation, classified as noncurrent.

FinancialMetric.name: Long-term Debt and Lease Obligation, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of long-term debt and lease obligation, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), after Reclassification, Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after reclassification, of tax expense (benefit) for gain (loss) from derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale of Property, Plant, and Equipment
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from the sale of long-lived, physical assets that are used in the normal conduct of business to produce goods and services and not intended for resale.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale of Property, Plant, and Equipment
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from the sale of long-lived, physical assets that are used in the normal conduct of business to produce goods and services and not intended for resale.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale of Property, Plant, and Equipment
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from the sale of long-lived, physical assets that are used in the normal conduct of business to produce goods and services and not intended for resale.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Sale of Property, Plant, and Equipment
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from the sale of long-lived, physical assets that are used in the normal conduct of business to produce goods and services and not intended for resale.

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow during the period from the repayment of aggregate short-term and long-term debt. Excludes payment of capital lease obligations.

FinancialMetric.name: Depreciation
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the cost of tangible assets over the assets' useful lives. Includes production and non-production related depreciation.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) Available to Common Stockholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Construction in Progress, Gross
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of structure or a modification to a structure under construction. Includes recently completed structures or modifications to structures that have not been placed into service.

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation, including but not limited to, long-term debt, capital lease obligations, operating lease obligations, purchase obligations, and other commitments.

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation, to be Paid, after Year Five
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation to be paid after fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation, to be Paid, Year Five
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation to be paid in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation, to be Paid, Year Four
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation to be paid in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation, to be Paid, Year One
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation to be paid in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation, to be Paid, Year Two
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation to be paid in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation, to be Paid, Year Three
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation to be paid in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Contractual Obligation, to be Paid, Remainder of Fiscal Year
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of contractual obligation to be paid in remainder of current fiscal year.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowances, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible differences from reserves and accruals, compensation and benefit costs, and other provisions, reserves, and allowances.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Deferred Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from capitalized costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Rent Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of rent expense incurred for leased assets, including but not limited to, furniture and equipment, that is not directly or indirectly associated with the manufacture, sale or creation of a product or product line.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Rent Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of rent expense incurred for leased assets, including but not limited to, furniture and equipment, that is not directly or indirectly associated with the manufacture, sale or creation of a product or product line.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment, to be Paid, after Year Five
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of commitment classified as other to be paid after fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment, to be Paid, Year Five
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of commitment classified as other to be paid in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment, to be Paid, Year Four
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of commitment classified as other to be paid in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment, to be Paid, Year One
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of commitment classified as other to be paid in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment, to be Paid, Year Two
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of commitment classified as other to be paid in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment, to be Paid, Year Three
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of commitment classified as other to be paid in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

FinancialMetric.name: Other Commitment, to be Paid, Remainder of Fiscal Year
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of commitment classified as other to be paid in remainder of current fiscal year.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other income tax expense (benefit).

FinancialMetric.name: Other Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other income tax expense (benefit).

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Value, Issued
FinancialMetric.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable preferred stock (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable preferred shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

FinancialMetric.name: Adjustment to Additional Paid in Capital, Income Tax Effect from Share-based Compensation, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in additional paid in capital (APIC) resulting from a tax benefit (deficiency) associated with an share-based compensation plan other than an employee stock ownership plan (ESOP).

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Rent Expense, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Rental expense for the reporting period incurred under operating leases, including minimum and any contingent rent expense, net of related sublease income.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Rent Expense, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Rental expense for the reporting period incurred under operating leases, including minimum and any contingent rent expense, net of related sublease income.

FinancialMetric.name: Operating Leases, Rent Expense, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Rental expense for the reporting period incurred under operating leases, including minimum and any contingent rent expense, net of related sublease income.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Liquidation Preference, Value
FinancialMetric.description: Value of the difference between preference in liquidation and the par or stated values of the preferred shares.

FinancialMetric.name: Impairment of Long-Lived Assets Held-for-use
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate amount of write-downs for impairments recognized during the period for long lived assets held for use (including those held for disposal by means other than sale).

FinancialMetric.name: Impairment of Long-Lived Assets Held-for-use
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate amount of write-downs for impairments recognized during the period for long lived assets held for use (including those held for disposal by means other than sale).

FinancialMetric.name: Impairment of Long-Lived Assets Held-for-use
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate amount of write-downs for impairments recognized during the period for long lived assets held for use (including those held for disposal by means other than sale).

FinancialMetric.name: Impairment of Long-Lived Assets Held-for-use
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate amount of write-downs for impairments recognized during the period for long lived assets held for use (including those held for disposal by means other than sale).

FinancialMetric.name: Adjustments to Additional Paid in Capital, Other
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other increase (decrease) in additional paid in capital (APIC).

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Conversion, Original Debt, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: "The amount of the original debt being converted in a noncash (or part noncash) transaction. ""Part noncash"" refers to that portion of the transaction not resulting in cash receipts or cash payments in the period."

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax and Other Liabilities, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences, with jurisdictional netting, and liabilities classified as noncurrent and other.

FinancialMetric.name: Defined Contribution Plan, Employer Discretionary Contribution Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of discretionary contributions made by an employer to a defined contribution plan.

FinancialMetric.name: Due to Related Parties, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of obligations due all related parties. For classified balance sheets, represents the current portion of such liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

FinancialMetric.name: Share-based Payment Arrangement, Exercise of Option, Tax Benefit
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax benefit from exercise of option under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Litigation Settlement, Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of litigation expense, including but not limited to legal, forensic, accounting, and investigative fees.

FinancialMetric.name: Noncontrolling Interest, Decrease from Distributions to Noncontrolling Interest Holders
FinancialMetric.description: Decrease in noncontrolling interest balance from payment of dividends or other distributions by the non-wholly owned subsidiary or partially owned entity, included in the consolidation of the parent entity, to the noncontrolling interest holders.

FinancialMetric.name: Noncontrolling Interest, Decrease from Distributions to Noncontrolling Interest Holders
FinancialMetric.description: Decrease in noncontrolling interest balance from payment of dividends or other distributions by the non-wholly owned subsidiary or partially owned entity, included in the consolidation of the parent entity, to the noncontrolling interest holders.

FinancialMetric.name: Noncontrolling Interest, Decrease from Distributions to Noncontrolling Interest Holders
FinancialMetric.description: Decrease in noncontrolling interest balance from payment of dividends or other distributions by the non-wholly owned subsidiary or partially owned entity, included in the consolidation of the parent entity, to the noncontrolling interest holders.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow paid to third parties in connection with debt origination, which will be amortized over the remaining maturity period of the associated long-term debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow paid to third parties in connection with debt origination, which will be amortized over the remaining maturity period of the associated long-term debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after cash payment, of expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses related to a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Issued During Period, Value, Acquisitions
FinancialMetric.description: Value of stock issued pursuant to acquisitions during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in unrecognized tax benefits attributable to uncertain tax positions taken in tax returns.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrealized Gain (Loss) on Investments
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrealized Gain (Loss) on Investments
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrealized Gain (Loss) on Investments
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Exempt Income, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to income (loss) exempt from income taxes.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Assets, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount classified as assets attributable to disposal group held for sale or disposed of, expected to be disposed of within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) from continuing operations per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of net income (loss) derived from continuing operations during the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per basic share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per basic share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per basic share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Basic Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per basic share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per diluted share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per diluted share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per diluted share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations and Disposal of Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Per Diluted Share
FinancialMetric.description: Per diluted share amount, after tax, of income (loss) from the day-to-day business activities of the discontinued operation and gain (loss) from the disposal of the discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Liabilities, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount classified as liabilities attributable to disposal group held for sale or disposed of, expected to be disposed of within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Machinery and Equipment, Gross
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before accumulated depreciation of tangible personal property used to produce goods and services, including, but is not limited to, tools, dies and molds, computer and office equipment.

FinancialMetric.name: New Accounting Pronouncement or Change in Accounting Principle, Effect of Adoption, Quantification (Deprecated 2020-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Represents the quantification of the effect of adopting the new accounting standard or change in accounting principle expected by the entity to have a significant effect on the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: New Accounting Pronouncement or Change in Accounting Principle, Effect of Adoption, Quantification (Deprecated 2020-01-31)
FinancialMetric.description: Represents the quantification of the effect of adopting the new accounting standard or change in accounting principle expected by the entity to have a significant effect on the entity's financial statements.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, Defined Benefit Plan, Reclassification Adjustment from AOCI, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification adjustment from accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for net periodic benefit cost (credit) of defined benefit plan.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, Defined Benefit Plan, Reclassification Adjustment from AOCI, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification adjustment from accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for net periodic benefit cost (credit) of defined benefit plan.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, Defined Benefit Plan, Reclassification Adjustment from AOCI, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification adjustment from accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for net periodic benefit cost (credit) of defined benefit plan.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, Defined Benefit Plan, Reclassification Adjustment from AOCI, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of reclassification adjustment from accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for net periodic benefit cost (credit) of defined benefit plan.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Receivables
FinancialMetric.description: Amount due from parties in nontrade transactions, classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Payment for Pension and Other Postretirement Benefits
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for pension and other postretirement benefits. Includes, but is not limited to, employer contribution to fund plan asset and payment to retiree.

FinancialMetric.name: Payment for Pension and Other Postretirement Benefits
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for pension and other postretirement benefits. Includes, but is not limited to, employer contribution to fund plan asset and payment to retiree.

FinancialMetric.name: Payment for Pension and Other Postretirement Benefits
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for pension and other postretirement benefits. Includes, but is not limited to, employer contribution to fund plan asset and payment to retiree.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring, Settlement and Impairment Provisions
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring, Settlement and Impairment Provisions
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring, Settlement and Impairment Provisions
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring, Settlement and Impairment Provisions
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

FinancialMetric.name: Tax Adjustments, Settlements, and Unusual Provisions
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) to previously recorded tax expense. Includes, but is not limited to, significant settlements of income tax disputes, and unusual tax positions or infrequent actions taken by the entity, including tax assessment reversal, and IRS tax settlement.

FinancialMetric.name: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, Change in Tax Rate, Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income tax expense (benefit) for remeasurement of deferred tax from change in tax rate pursuant to Tax Cuts and Jobs Act.

FinancialMetric.name: Accounts Receivable, Sale
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease from sale of accounts receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Accounts Receivable, Sale
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease from sale of accounts receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Accounts Receivable, Sale
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease from sale of accounts receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Adjustments to Reconcile Net Income (Loss) to Cash Provided by (Used in) Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: The sum of adjustments which are added to or deducted from net income or loss, including the portion attributable to noncontrolling interest, to reflect cash provided by or used in operating activities, in accordance with the indirect cash flow method.

FinancialMetric.name: Adjustments to Reconcile Net Income (Loss) to Cash Provided by (Used in) Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: The sum of adjustments which are added to or deducted from net income or loss, including the portion attributable to noncontrolling interest, to reflect cash provided by or used in operating activities, in accordance with the indirect cash flow method.

FinancialMetric.name: Adjustments to Reconcile Net Income (Loss) to Cash Provided by (Used in) Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: The sum of adjustments which are added to or deducted from net income or loss, including the portion attributable to noncontrolling interest, to reflect cash provided by or used in operating activities, in accordance with the indirect cash flow method.

FinancialMetric.name: Adjustments to Reconcile Net Income (Loss) to Cash Provided by (Used in) Operating Activities
FinancialMetric.description: The sum of adjustments which are added to or deducted from net income or loss, including the portion attributable to noncontrolling interest, to reflect cash provided by or used in operating activities, in accordance with the indirect cash flow method.

FinancialMetric.name: Assets Held-for-sale, Not Part of Disposal Group, Current, Other
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other assets held-for-sale that are not part of a disposal group, expected to be sold within a year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Combination, Acquisition Related Costs
FinancialMetric.description: This element represents acquisition-related costs incurred to effect a business combination which costs have been expensed during the period. Such costs include finder's fees; advisory, legal, accounting, valuation, and other professional or consulting fees; general administrative costs, including the costs of maintaining an internal acquisitions department; and may include costs of registering and issuing debt and equity securities.

FinancialMetric.name: Business Combination, Recognized Identifiable Assets Acquired and Liabilities Assumed, Restructuring Liabilities
FinancialMetric.description: This item represents liabilities associated with restructuring or exit activities of the acquiree, existing at the acquisition date (present liabilities of the acquiree).

FinancialMetric.name: Capitalized Contract Cost, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization and accumulated impairment loss, of asset recognized from cost incurred to obtain or fulfill contract with customer.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Asset, after Allowance for Credit Loss
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration in exchange for good or service transferred to customer when right is conditioned on something other than passage of time.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost-method Investments, Other than Temporary Impairment
FinancialMetric.description: This item represents an other than temporary decline in value that has been recognized against an investment accounted for under the cost method of accounting. The excess of the carrying amount over the fair value of the investment represents the amount of the write down which is or was reflected in earnings. The written down value is a new cost basis with the adjusted value of the investment becoming its new carrying value. Evidence of a loss in value might include, but would not necessarily be limited to, absence of an ability to recover the carrying amount of the investment or inability of the investee to sustain an earnings capacity which would justify the carrying amount of the investment.

FinancialMetric.name: Cost-method Investments, Other than Temporary Impairment
FinancialMetric.description: This item represents an other than temporary decline in value that has been recognized against an investment accounted for under the cost method of accounting. The excess of the carrying amount over the fair value of the investment represents the amount of the write down which is or was reflected in earnings. The written down value is a new cost basis with the adjusted value of the investment becoming its new carrying value. Evidence of a loss in value might include, but would not necessarily be limited to, absence of an ability to recover the carrying amount of the investment or inability of the investee to sustain an earnings capacity which would justify the carrying amount of the investment.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Deferred Expense, Debt Issuance Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from debt issuance costs.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Gross, Noncurrent
FinancialMetric.description: Gross amount of noncurrent deferred tax liabilities, which result from applying the applicable tax rate to taxable temporary differences pertaining to each jurisdiction to which the entity is obligated to pay income tax.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Amounts of Material Contingent Liabilities Remaining
FinancialMetric.description: Amounts of material contingent liabilities, for example, but not limited to, product or environmental liabilities or litigation, that remain with the entity despite the disposal of the disposal group that is classified as a component of the entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation, before Income Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation, before Income Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation, before Income Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation, before Income Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue attributable to disposal group, including, but not limited to, discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue attributable to disposal group, including, but not limited to, discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue attributable to disposal group, including, but not limited to, discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Revenue
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue attributable to disposal group, including, but not limited to, discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Distribution Made to Limited Partner, Cash Distributions Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash distribution paid to unit-holder of limited partnership (LP).

FinancialMetric.name: Distribution Made to Limited Partner, Cash Distributions Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash distribution paid to unit-holder of limited partnership (LP).

FinancialMetric.name: Distribution Made to Limited Partner, Cash Distributions Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash distribution paid to unit-holder of limited partnership (LP).

FinancialMetric.name: Distribution Made to Limited Partner, Cash Distributions Paid
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash distribution paid to unit-holder of limited partnership (LP).

FinancialMetric.name: Distribution Made to Limited Partner, Distributions Paid, Per Unit
FinancialMetric.description: Per unit of ownership amount of cash distributions paid to unit-holder of a limited partnership (LP).

FinancialMetric.name: Due from Related Parties, Current
FinancialMetric.description: The aggregate amount of receivables to be collected from related parties where one party can exercise control or significant influence over another party; including affiliates, owners or officers and their immediate families, pension trusts, and so forth, at the financial statement date. which are usually due within one year (or one business cycle).

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, at Federal Statutory Income Tax Rate, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Net earnings after all expenses and taxes

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Foreign Income Tax Rate Differential, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations applicable to statutory income tax expense (benefit) outside of the country of domicile.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation,Other Reconciling Items, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference, between reported income tax expense (benefit) and the expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations, that is attributable to tax exempt income, equity in earnings (loss) of an unconsolidated subsidiary, minority interest income (expense), tax holiday, disposition of a business, disposition of an asset, repatriation of foreign earnings, repatriation of foreign earnings jobs creation act of 2004, change in enacted tax rate, prior year income taxes, change in deferred tax asset valuation allowance, and other adjustments.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation,Other Reconciling Items, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference, between reported income tax expense (benefit) and the expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations, that is attributable to tax exempt income, equity in earnings (loss) of an unconsolidated subsidiary, minority interest income (expense), tax holiday, disposition of a business, disposition of an asset, repatriation of foreign earnings, repatriation of foreign earnings jobs creation act of 2004, change in enacted tax rate, prior year income taxes, change in deferred tax asset valuation allowance, and other adjustments.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Repatriation of Foreign Earnings, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the repatriation of foreign earnings.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Repatriation of Foreign Earnings, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the repatriation of foreign earnings.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Expense (Benefit), Share-based Payment Arrangement, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying domestic federal statutory income tax rate to pretax income (loss) from continuing operation, attributable to expense for award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes expense determined to be nondeductible upon grant or after for award under share-based payment arrangement.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, State and Local Income Taxes, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations applicable to state and local income tax expense (benefit), net of federal tax expense (benefit).

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Research, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to research tax credit.

FinancialMetric.name: Finance Lease, Liability, Payments, Due in Rolling after Year Five
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease, due after fifth rolling twelve months following latest statement of financial position date. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on rolling approach, from latest statement of financial position date.

FinancialMetric.name: Financing Receivable, Sale
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease from sale and reclassification to held-for-sale of financing receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Financing Receivable, Sale
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease from sale and reclassification to held-for-sale of financing receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Financing Receivable, Sale
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease from sale and reclassification to held-for-sale of financing receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Financing Receivable, Sale
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of decrease from sale and reclassification to held-for-sale of financing receivable.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Properties
FinancialMetric.description: The difference between the carrying value and the sale price of real estate or properties that were intended to be sold or held for capital appreciation or rental income. This element refers to the gain (loss) included in earnings and not to the cash proceeds of the sale. This element is a noncash adjustment to net income when calculating net cash generated by operating activities using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Properties
FinancialMetric.description: The difference between the carrying value and the sale price of real estate or properties that were intended to be sold or held for capital appreciation or rental income. This element refers to the gain (loss) included in earnings and not to the cash proceeds of the sale. This element is a noncash adjustment to net income when calculating net cash generated by operating activities using the indirect method.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Assets and Asset Impairment Charges
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of gain (loss) from the difference between the sale price or salvage price and the book value of an asset that was sold or retired, and gain (loss) from the write down of assets from their carrying value to fair value.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Assets and Asset Impairment Charges
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of gain (loss) from the difference between the sale price or salvage price and the book value of an asset that was sold or retired, and gain (loss) from the write down of assets from their carrying value to fair value.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Assets and Asset Impairment Charges
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of gain (loss) from the difference between the sale price or salvage price and the book value of an asset that was sold or retired, and gain (loss) from the write down of assets from their carrying value to fair value.

FinancialMetric.name: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Assets and Asset Impairment Charges
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of gain (loss) from the difference between the sale price or salvage price and the book value of an asset that was sold or retired, and gain (loss) from the write down of assets from their carrying value to fair value.

FinancialMetric.name: Goodwill, Purchase Accounting Adjustments
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) from adjustments after acquisition date under purchase accounting of an asset representing the future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.name: Goodwill, Written off Related to Sale of Business Unit
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of divestiture of an asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

FinancialMetric.name: Guarantees, Fair Value Disclosure
FinancialMetric.description: Fair value portion of guarantee, including, but not limited to, financial standby letter of credit, fair value guarantee, guarantee of collection of scheduled contractual cash flows from financial assets, and contracts that contingently require the guarantor to make payments or perform services.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the parent.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the parent. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the parent. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the parent. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation attributable to the parent. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Subsidiaries, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) of subsidiary attributable to the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Subsidiaries, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) of subsidiary attributable to the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Subsidiaries, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) of subsidiary attributable to the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income (Loss) from Subsidiaries, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) of subsidiary attributable to the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations, Adjustment of Deferred Tax (Asset) Liability
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income tax expense (benefit) from continuing operations attributable to an adjustment of a deferred tax liability or asset for enacted changes in tax laws or rates or a change in the tax status of the entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations, Adjustment of Deferred Tax (Asset) Liability
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income tax expense (benefit) from continuing operations attributable to an adjustment of a deferred tax liability or asset for enacted changes in tax laws or rates or a change in the tax status of the entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Current Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in current operating assets after deduction of current operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Current Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in current operating assets after deduction of current operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Current Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in current operating assets after deduction of current operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Current Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in current operating assets after deduction of current operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Noncurrent Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in noncurrent operating assets after deduction of noncurrent operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Noncurrent Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in noncurrent operating assets after deduction of noncurrent operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Noncurrent Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in noncurrent operating assets after deduction of noncurrent operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Increase (Decrease) in Other Noncurrent Assets and Liabilities, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in noncurrent operating assets after deduction of noncurrent operating liabilities classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Incremental Common Shares Attributable to Dilutive Effect of Conversion of Preferred Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Additional shares included in the calculation of diluted EPS as a result of the potentially dilutive effect of convertible preferred stock using the if-converted method.

FinancialMetric.name: Incremental Common Shares Attributable to Dilutive Effect of Conversion of Preferred Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Additional shares included in the calculation of diluted EPS as a result of the potentially dilutive effect of convertible preferred stock using the if-converted method.

FinancialMetric.name: Incremental Common Shares Attributable to Dilutive Effect of Conversion of Preferred Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Additional shares included in the calculation of diluted EPS as a result of the potentially dilutive effect of convertible preferred stock using the if-converted method.

FinancialMetric.name: Incremental Common Shares Attributable to Dilutive Effect of Conversion of Preferred Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Additional shares included in the calculation of diluted EPS as a result of the potentially dilutive effect of convertible preferred stock using the if-converted method.

FinancialMetric.name: Line of Credit Facility, Capacity Available for Specific Purpose Other than for Trade Purchases
FinancialMetric.description: The maximum amount of borrowing capacity under a line of credit that is available as of the balance sheet date for a specific purpose other than for financing goods acquired for inventory or imminent delivery to a customer.

FinancialMetric.name: Long-term Debt, Maturities, Repayments of Principal in Next Rolling Twelve Months
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of long-term debt payable, sinking fund requirements, and other securities issued that are redeemable by holder at fixed or determinable prices and dates maturing in the next rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Continuing Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from continuing operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Basic
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Net Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations Available to Common Shareholders, Diluted
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities, and addition from assumption of issuance of common shares for dilutive potential common shares; of income (loss) from discontinued operations available to common shareholders.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Businesses Acquired
FinancialMetric.description: The number of businesses acquired by the entity during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Businesses Acquired
FinancialMetric.description: The number of businesses acquired by the entity during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Number of Businesses Acquired
FinancialMetric.description: The number of businesses acquired by the entity during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Assets, Miscellaneous, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other miscellaneous assets expected to be realized or consumed within one year or operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, Defined Benefit Plan, after Reclassification Adjustment, after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax and reclassification adjustment, of (increase) decrease in accumulated other comprehensive income for defined benefit plan.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Nonoperating Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expense related to nonoperating activities, classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Nonoperating Income
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income related to nonoperating activities, classified as other.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Tax Expense (Benefit)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other income tax expense (benefit).

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Capital Distribution
FinancialMetric.description: Cash outflow to owners or shareholders, excluding ordinary dividends. Includes special dividends.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Capital Distribution
FinancialMetric.description: Cash outflow to owners or shareholders, excluding ordinary dividends. Includes special dividends.

FinancialMetric.name: Payment for Debt Extinguishment or Debt Prepayment Cost
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for cost from early extinguishment and prepayment of debt. Includes, but is not limited to, third-party cost, premium paid, and other fee paid to lender directly for debt extinguishment or debt prepayment. Excludes accrued interest.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Ordinary Dividends, Preferred Stock and Preference Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow in the form of ordinary dividends to preferred shareholders of the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Ordinary Dividends, Preferred Stock and Preference Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow in the form of ordinary dividends to preferred shareholders of the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Ordinary Dividends, Preferred Stock and Preference Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow in the form of ordinary dividends to preferred shareholders of the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Payments of Ordinary Dividends, Preferred Stock and Preference Stock
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow in the form of ordinary dividends to preferred shareholders of the parent entity.

FinancialMetric.name: Payment for Pension and Other Postretirement Benefits
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of cash outflow for pension and other postretirement benefits. Includes, but is not limited to, employer contribution to fund plan asset and payment to retiree.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Dividend Rate, Percentage
FinancialMetric.description: The percentage rate used to calculate dividend payments on preferred stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Dividend Rate, Percentage
FinancialMetric.description: The percentage rate used to calculate dividend payments on preferred stock.

FinancialMetric.name: Preferred Stock, Liquidation Preference Per Share
FinancialMetric.description: The per share liquidation preference (or restrictions) of nonredeemable preferred stock (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer) that has a preference in involuntary liquidation considerably in excess of the par or stated value of the shares. The liquidation preference is the difference between the preference in liquidation and the par or stated values of the share.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Divestiture of Businesses
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow associated with the amount received from the sale of a portion of the company's business, for example a segment, division, branch or other business, during the period.

FinancialMetric.name: Repayments of Debt
FinancialMetric.description: The cash outflow during the period from the repayment of aggregate short-term and long-term debt. Excludes payment of capital lease obligations.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring Costs and Asset Impairment Charges

Excludes expenses related to a business combination, a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring Reserve, Accrual Adjustment
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of expense (reversal of expense) which increases (decreases) the restructuring reserve from an adjustment to a previously accrued restructuring liability.

FinancialMetric.name: Revenue from Related Parties
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue, fees and commissions earned from transactions between (a) a parent company and its subsidiaries; (b) subsidiaries of a common parent; (c) an entity and trusts for the benefit of employees, for example, but not limited to, pension and profit-sharing trusts that are managed by or under the trusteeship of the entity's management; (d) an entity and its principal, owners, management, or members of their immediate families; and (e) affiliates.

FinancialMetric.description: Amount of revenue, fees and commissions earned from transactions between (a) a parent company and its subsidiaries; (b) subsidiaries of a common parent; (c) an entity and trusts for the benefit of employees, for example, but not limited to, pension and profit-sharing trusts that are managed by or under the trusteeship of the entity's management; (d) an entity and its principal, owners, management, or members of their immediate families; and (e) affiliates.

FinancialMetric.description: Amount of reduction to gross sales revenue attributable to price protection agreements with customers or clients which limit the sales price of goods or services.

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Issued During Period, Shares, Conversion of Units
FinancialMetric.description: The number of shares issued during the period upon the conversion of units. An example of a convertible unit is an umbrella partnership real estate investment trust unit (UPREIT unit).
