FinancialMetric.name: Stock Issued During Period, Value, Conversion of Units
FinancialMetric.description: Value of stock issued during the period upon the conversion of units. An example of a convertible unit is an umbrella partnership real estate investment trust unit (UPREIT unit).

FinancialMetric.name: Stock Issued During Period, Value, Conversion of Units
FinancialMetric.description: Value of stock issued during the period upon the conversion of units. An example of a convertible unit is an umbrella partnership real estate investment trust unit (UPREIT unit).

FinancialMetric.name: Shares Issued, Value, Share-based Payment Arrangement, after Forfeiture
FinancialMetric.description: Value, after forfeiture, of shares issued under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes employee stock ownership plan (ESOP).

FinancialMetric.name: Shares Issued, Value, Share-based Payment Arrangement, before Forfeiture
FinancialMetric.description: Value, before forfeiture, of shares issued under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes employee stock ownership plan (ESOP).

FinancialMetric.name: Shares Issued, Value, Share-based Payment Arrangement, before Forfeiture
FinancialMetric.description: Value, before forfeiture, of shares issued under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes employee stock ownership plan (ESOP).

FinancialMetric.name: Tax Adjustments, Settlements, and Unusual Provisions
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) to previously recorded tax expense. Includes, but is not limited to, significant settlements of income tax disputes, and unusual tax positions or infrequent actions taken by the entity, including tax assessment reversal, and IRS tax settlement.

FinancialMetric.name: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, Transition Tax for Accumulated Foreign Earnings, Income Tax Expense
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of income tax expense from transition tax on accumulated earnings of controlled foreign corporation deemed repatriated pursuant to Tax Cuts and Jobs Act.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in unrecognized tax benefits attributable to uncertain tax positions taken in tax returns.

FinancialMetric.name: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Period Increase (Decrease)
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of increase (decrease) in unrecognized tax benefits attributable to uncertain tax positions taken in tax returns.

FinancialMetric.name: Write off of Deferred Debt Issuance Cost
FinancialMetric.description: Write-off of amounts previously capitalized as debt issuance cost in an extinguishment of debt.

FinancialMetric.name: Conversion of Stock, Shares Issued
FinancialMetric.description: "The number of new shares issued in the conversion of stock in a noncash (or part noncash) transaction. Noncash is defined as transactions during a period that do not result in cash receipts or cash payments in the period. ""Part noncash"" refers to that portion of the transaction not resulting in cash receipts or cash payments in the period."

FinancialMetric.name: Convertible Preferred Stock, Shares Issued upon Conversion
FinancialMetric.description: Number of shares issued for each share of convertible preferred stock that is converted.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash Flow Hedge Derivative Instrument Liabilities at Fair Value
FinancialMetric.description: Fair value of all liability derivatives designated as cash flow hedging instruments.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash Flow Hedges Derivative Instruments at Fair Value, Net
FinancialMetric.description: Net fair value of all derivative instruments designated as cash flow hedging instruments, which is ordinarily reflected within other comprehensive income.

FinancialMetric.name: Cash Flow Hedge Derivative Instrument Assets at Fair Value
FinancialMetric.description: Fair value of all asset derivatives designated as cash flow hedging instruments.

FinancialMetric.name: AOCI, Cash Flow Hedge, Cumulative Gain (Loss), after Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after tax, of accumulated gain (loss) on derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.

FinancialMetric.name: Debt Instrument, Redemption Price, Percentage
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage price of original principal amount of debt at which debt can be redeemed by the issuer.

FinancialMetric.name: Derivative, Cash Received on Hedge
FinancialMetric.description: The amount of cash received during the period on settlement of a hedge.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes gain (loss) on disposal and provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes gain (loss) on disposal and provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes gain (loss) on disposal and provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period, Net of Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes gain (loss) on disposal and provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Tax Effect of Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes tax expense (benefit) for gain (loss) on disposal and for provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Tax Effect of Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes tax expense (benefit) for gain (loss) on disposal and for provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Tax Effect of Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes tax expense (benefit) for gain (loss) on disposal and for provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Discontinued Operation, Tax Effect of Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operation During Phase-out Period
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from operations classified as a discontinued operation. Excludes tax expense (benefit) for gain (loss) on disposal and for provision for gain (loss) until disposal.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Consideration
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of consideration received or receivable for the disposal of assets and liabilities, including discontinued operation.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Goodwill
FinancialMetric.description: Amount classified as goodwill attributable to disposal group held for sale or disposed of.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Intangible Assets
FinancialMetric.description: Amount classified as intangible assets, excluding goodwill, attributable to disposal group held for sale or disposed of.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Other Assets
FinancialMetric.description: Amount classified as other assets attributable to disposal group held for sale or disposed of.

FinancialMetric.name: Disposal Group, Including Discontinued Operation, Other Liabilities, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount classified as other liabilities attributable to disposal group held for sale or disposed of, expected to be disposed of within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Restructuring Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses associated with a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Restructuring Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses associated with a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Restructuring Costs
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of other expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses associated with a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

FinancialMetric.name: Contract with Customer, Asset, after Allowance for Credit Loss, Current
FinancialMetric.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration in exchange for good or service transferred to customer when right is conditioned on something other than passage of time, classified as current.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Disposition of Asset, Amount
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations, attributable to disposition of asset. Includes, but is not limited to, intra-entity transfer of asset other than inventory.

FinancialMetric.name: Restructuring and Related Cost, Incurred Cost
FinancialMetric.description: Discloses the amount charged against the accrued restructuring reserves, or earnings if not previously accrued, during the period for the specified type of restructuring cost.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Issuance of Commercial Paper
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from borrowing by issuing commercial paper.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Issuance of Commercial Paper
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from borrowing by issuing commercial paper.

FinancialMetric.name: Proceeds from Issuance of Commercial Paper
FinancialMetric.description: The cash inflow from borrowing by issuing commercial paper.

FinancialMetric.name: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Credit Carryforwards, Alternative Minimum Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible alternative minimum tax credit carryforwards.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Change in Deferred Tax Assets Valuation Allowance, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to changes in the valuation allowance for deferred tax assets.

FinancialMetric.name: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Contingency, Percent
FinancialMetric.description: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to income tax contingencies. Includes, but not limited to, domestic tax contingency, foreign tax contingency, state and local tax contingency, and other contingencies.

FinancialMetric.name: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Cash Flow Hedge, Gain (Loss), Reclassification, Tax
FinancialMetric.description: Amount of tax expense (benefit) for reclassification of gain (loss) from accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI) for derivative instrument designated and qualifying as cash flow hedge included in assessment of hedge effectiveness.
